subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained unto Our presence in the Most Great Prison and been honored with gracious favor, and the yearning of thy heart in love and separation hath been heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوبت در سجن اعظم بلحاظ عنایت فائز و حنین قلبت در حب و فراق از آن اصغا گشت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @purpose; goal of creation
